categories.string_transform: TRIM / UPPER / INITCAP / casts / date functions
categories.edge_case: COALESCE / NULLIF / LEAST / GREATEST null & bound guards

grades.A: has functional test(s) AND a unit test exercising the model's logic categories
grades.B: has functional and/or singular test(s) but NO unit test covering the logic
grades.F: no tests at all (also blocked by the on-run-start interceptor)

notes: Central defaults for the zoom-ttd plugin (interceptor + graders + generators).
